description: The finding already includes a SHA256 checksum (0e5472996be3148e111dc53d271ecc56d20690257e930aded738b52ce7880db6), 5 random nonzero triples from S_30, S_20 spot-check samples with a Sage cross-check command, and S_30 aggregate verification via cumulative nonzero counts in the dump log.
